reviews.comment:
La atención fue buena, pero respecto a los  baños, los mismos presentaban un estado lamentable. El olor era desagradable y existía una evidente falta de limpieza. Muy distinto a muchas estaciones de servicio  YPF.

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but the restrooms were in a deplorable state. The smell was unpleasant, and there was a clear lack of cleanliness. Quite unlike many other YPF service stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0aVlqWS1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Punto estrategico para cargar combustible si venís de Córdoba o San Luis y seguís con destino San Juan o la zona de Valle fértil ya que hasta esta última localidad no tenes otra estación. Cuenta con mucho movimiento y varios surtidores como los beneficios del automóvil club y zona de descanso.

(Translated by Google)
A strategic point to refuel if you're coming from Córdoba or San Luis and continuing on to San Juan or the Valle Fértil area, as there's no other gas station until you reach Valle Fértil. It's a busy station with several pumps, as well as the benefits of the automobile club and a rest area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0cnByLXZnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
